    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"\nW pixel at: {n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 20:
        print(f"Charcoal: boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The W-box is now at rows 33-35, cols 17-19 (W pixel at 34, 19). The charcoal box is at rows 32-36, cols 11-15. The W-box is to the right of the charcoal box, not inside it.
Looking at the ASCII:
```
33: gwwcwwwcwwNNNwwwggggggggg...
34: gwwcwwwcwwNWNwwwggggggggg...
35: gwwcwwwcwwNNNwwwggggggggg...
```
The charcoal box is at cols 11-15 (c at cols 11-15), and the W-box is at cols 17-19. There's a gap of 1 column (col 16 is w).
Wait, the charcoal box boundary is [[32, 11], [32, 15], [36, 15], [36, 11]]. So it's cols 11-15, rows 32-36. The interior is cols 12-14, rows 33-35.
The W-box is at cols 17-19, rows 33-35. It's at the same rows as the charcoal box interior but to the right.
I moved RIGHT 3 times from cols 9-11, which should have put it at cols 12-14. But it's at cols 17-19. That's 5 columns right, not 3. Let me check...
Actually, wait. The W-box was at cols 9-11 before. After DOWN, it would still be at cols 9-11 but rows 33-35. Then RIGHT x3 would move it to cols 12-14. But the W pixel is at col 19, meaning the box is at cols 17-19. That's 8 columns from the original position.
Hmm, something's off. Let me re-examine. Before the DOWN+RIGHT sequence:
- W-box was at rows 30-32, cols 9-11 (W pixel at 31, 10)
After DOWN:
- W-box should be at rows 33-35, cols 9-11
After RIGHT x3:
- W-box should be at rows 33-35, cols 12-14
But the W pixel is at (34, 19), which means cols 17-19. That's 8 columns right from the original position.
Wait, maybe the W-box was at a different position than I thought. Let me check the transition history more carefully.
Actually, I think the issue is that I was tracking positions incorrectly. Let me just look at the current state and figure out where the W-box needs to go.
Current: W-box at rows 33-35, cols 17-19
Charcoal box interior: rows 33-35, cols 12-14
Need to move LEFT 3 times to get to cols 12-14.
